title: SE-6 domestic
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''SE-6 domestics''' were [[Droid/Legends|droids]] used for serving. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] owned one and had it onboard [[Shelter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''

[[Category:Service droid models]]
